Item.Question: The music plays. We are ____ with our feet.
My picture needs red and blue. I am ____.
I follow the line on paper. I am ____.
We have 2 marbles. We get 1 more. We are ____.
We have 5 stickers. We give 2 away. We are ____.
I touch the desk softly with my finger. I am ____.
My friend cannot reach the door. I am ____.
Look: 9 − 4. The number gets smaller. We are ____.
Look: 3 + 5. The number gets bigger. We are ____.
